message:
fix: disable polecat pre-sync — polecats are ephemeral, not persistent (GH#1973)

Polecats spawn from origin/main via WorktreeAddFromRef and work on feature
branches. Pre-syncing (git fetch + rebase onto main) is wrong for ephemeral
workers — it can cause index lock hangs on large repos and spawn storms.
Pre-sync is designed for persistent roles (crew, refinery) that track main.

Two changes:
1. polecat.toml: needs_pre_sync = false
2. roles_test.go: update test expectation to match

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ prompt_template = "polecat.md.tmpl"
 [session]
 pattern = "{prefix}-{name}"
 work_dir = "{town}/{rig}/polecats/{name}"
-needs_pre_sync = true
+needs_pre_sync = false
 start_command = "exec claude --dangerously-skip-permissions"
 
 [env]
